name: Collaborative Development Team
description: Multi-agent development team for collaborative chat in Telegram

roles.name: architect
roles.description: System architect and designer - focuses on high-level design, architecture patterns, and system structure

roles.name: developer
roles.description: Software developer - implements features, writes code, and handles technical implementation

roles.name: tester
roles.description: QA and testing specialist - designs test cases, performs testing, and ensures quality

roles.name: manager
roles.description: Project manager - coordinates work, manages tasks, and handles documentation

roles.name: devops
roles.description: DevOps engineer - handles deployment, infrastructure, and operational concerns

roles.name: designer
roles.description: UI/UX designer - focuses on user interface, user experience, and design
